concerns.analysis: The output contains several minor text defects resulting from a failure to correctly parse red-line edits (underlines and strikethroughs) on pages 1 and 2. In several instances, words were concatenated incorrectly, and text intended to be deleted (strikethrough) was included as plain active text. In item (i), 'under' (struck) and 'described' (underlined) were merged into 'underdescribed'. In item (ii), 'for' (struck) and 'of' (underlined) were merged into 'forof'.
